Name: Jirachi
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when you put Jirachi from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, search your discard pile for a [P] Energy card and attach it to Jirachi.
Effects: Choose a number of your opponent's Stage 1 or Stage 2 Evolved Pokémon up to the amount of Energy attached to Jirachi. Remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of those Pokémon and put those cards back into your opponent's hand.

Name: Magmortar
Effects: Discard the top 3 cards from your deck. This attack does 50 damage times the number of Energy cards you discarded.
Discard 2 [R] Energy attached to Magmortar.

Name: Manaphy
Effects: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.

Name: Metagross
Ability-Effect: If you have any [P] Energy attached to your Active Pokémon, the Retreat Cost for that Pokémon is 0.
Effects: Choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Mismagius
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move a [P] Energy attached to 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Mismagius is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Octillery
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. ) Switch Octillery with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

Name: Politoed
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose a [W] Pokémon on your Bench and switch it with your Active Pokémon. This power can't be used if Politoed is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Flip a coin for each [W] Pokémon you have in play. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Name: Shaymin
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when you put Shaymin from your hand onto your Bench, you may move as many Energy cards attached to your Pokémon as you like to any of your other Pokémon.
Effects: Remove 3 damage counters from each of your Pokémon that has any Energy attached to it.

Name: Sudowoodo
Effects: Does 20 damage times the amount of [F] Energy attached to Sudowoodo.
The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

Name: Torterra
Effects: Remove from Torterra the number of damage counters equal to the damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

Name: Xatu
Effects: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.
Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Beedrill
Effects: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads.
The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is also Paralyzed.

Name: Blastoise
Ability-Effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move a [W] Energy attached to 1 of your Benched Pokémon to your Active Pokémon. This power can't be used if Blastoise is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Return 2 [W] Energy attached to Blastoise to your hand. Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 100 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Crobat
Effects: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.
Flip 4 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Name: Fearow
Effects: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Name: Floatzel
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a [W] Energy card from your hand to Floatzel. This power can't be used if Floatzel is affected by a Special Condition.

Name: Kingdra
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
You may do 50 damage plus 30 more damage. If you do, return an Energy card attached to Kingdra to your hand.

Name: Lanturn
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.
Move an Energy card attached to Lanturn to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Lucario
Effects: During your next turn, each of Lucario's attacks does 30 more damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Ninetales
Effects: Search your discard pile for up to 3 [R] Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon.
The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

Name: Poliwrath
Effects: Does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )
Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 damage plus 40 more damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Primeape
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 50 damage times the number of heads to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Roserade
Ability-Effect: When you attach a [G] Energy card or [P] Energy card from your hand to Roserade during your turn, you may use this power. If you attach a [G] Energy card, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused. If you attach a [P] Energy card, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. This power can't be used if Roserade is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to Roserade.

Name: Steelix
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Steelix by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

Ability-Effect: Once during your turn when you put Torkoal from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 damage plus 20 more damage.

Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may remove 1 damage counter from your Active Pokémon. This power can't be used if Cherrim is affected by a Special Condition.

Effects: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Metang
Effects: Search your discard pile for up to 2 [P] Energy cards and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like.

Effects: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Effects: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Wartortle
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Aipom
Effects: Move an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon to another of your opponent's Pokémon.

Effects: Onix can't attack during your next turn.

Effects: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Effects: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads. Roselia is now Confused.

Effects: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, search your deck for a [G] Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. If you do, shuffle your deck afterward.

Name: Turtwig

Effects: Search your deck for a card that evolves from Weedle and put it onto Weedle. (This counts as evolving Weedle. ) Shuffle your deck afterward.

Effects: Choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Description: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, search your deck for a Basic Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. If you do, shuffle your deck afterward.

Name: Good Rod
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it on top of your deck. If tails, search your discard pile for a Trainer card, show it to your opponent, and put it on top of your deck.

Name: Interviewer's Questions
Description: Look at the top 8 cards of your deck. Choose as many Energy cards as you like, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Judge
Description: Each player shuffles their hand into their deck and draws 4 cards.

Name: Life Herb
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, heal 60 damage and remove all Special Conditions from 1 of your Pokémon.

Name: PlusPower
Description: During this turn, your Pokémon's attacks do 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Pokémon Circulator
Description: Your opponent switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

Name: Rare Candy
Description: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card on the Basic Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon. ) You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

Name: Super Scoop Up
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your hand.
